title: Created workspace from outside source. Workspace continues to duffer not fully linking
excerpt: I have an outside source connected to Monday.com via a 1 way API created by the developer of the outside source. This source sends information to a workspace and board created by the outside source. This setup has been w…

posts.author: DFWcraters (Don Theriot)
posts.cookedHtml: I have an outside source connected to Monday.com via a 1 way API created by the developer of the outside source. This source sends information to a workspace and board created by the outside source. This setup has been working for several weeks but now it stopped working. The source and Monday are linking but the workspace contiunes to buffer prohibiting me from performing any type of action. Its not allowing me to adjust any of the permissions which I do get a message that says I do not have permission for this funciton. I am on the entperise plan which allows me to set permssions on any board or workspace. Anyone has a reccomendations on how to correct this.

posts.author: rehan.abdul (Rehan AQ | monday.com Partner)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Don, Check your permission in Administration section, Are you Admin on account? If not then ask your Admin to check your permissions. If you are Admin and you have permission as well, I would be happy to check with you what is the issue.

Regards
Rehan
Book time with me
